activities.instructions: Rewrite in the present perfect passive. Omit the agent.
activities.prompt: The team has repaired the lift.

evaluator.answer: The lift has been repaired

activities.explanation: El objeto singular pasa a sujeto y usa «has been repaired».

activities.instructions: Rewrite in the present perfect passive. Omit the agent.
activities.prompt: The caretaker has locked both gates.

evaluator.answer: Both gates have been locked

activities.explanation: El nuevo sujeto plural usa «have been locked».

activities.instructions: Rewrite with a passive after “can”. Omit the agent.
activities.prompt: Visitors can borrow wheelchairs at reception.

evaluator.answer: Wheelchairs can be borrowed at reception

activities.explanation: El modal se mantiene y se añade «be borrowed».

activities.instructions: Rewrite with a passive after “must”. Omit the agent.
activities.prompt: Staff must check every fire door weekly.

evaluator.answer: Every fire door must be checked weekly

activities.explanation: La obligación pasiva usa «must be checked».

activities.instructions: Rewrite with a passive after “should”. Omit the agent.
activities.prompt: The editor should shorten this heading.

evaluator.answer: This heading should be shortened

activities.explanation: La recomendación pasiva usa «should be shortened».

activities.instructions: Rewrite in the negative present perfect passive. Omit the agent.
activities.prompt: The laboratory hasn't identified the substance.

evaluator.answer: The substance hasn't been identified

activities.explanation: La negativa singular es «hasn't been identified».

activities.instructions: Rewrite in the negative present perfect passive. Omit the agent.
activities.prompt: The supplier hasn't sent the replacement parts.

evaluator.answer: The replacement parts haven't been sent

activities.explanation: El nuevo sujeto plural usa «haven't been sent».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the active question in the present perfect passive. Omit the agent.
activities.prompt: Have they inspected all the rooms?

evaluator.answer: Have all the rooms been inspected

activities.explanation: La pregunta plural mantiene «Have» y añade «been inspected».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the prohibition in the passive. Omit the agent.
activities.prompt: Visitors mustn't remove archive documents.

evaluator.answer: Archive documents mustn't be removed

activities.explanation: La prohibición pasiva usa «mustn't be removed».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the modal question in the passive. Omit the agent.
activities.prompt: Can customers change the delivery date?

evaluator.answer: Can the delivery date be changed

activities.explanation: La pregunta es «Can + sujeto + be + participio?».

activities.instructions: Rewrite in the present perfect passive, keeping “already”. Omit the agent.
activities.prompt: The finance team has already paid the deposit.

evaluator.answer: The deposit has already been paid

activities.explanation: «Already» se mantiene antes de «been».

activities.instructions: Rewrite in the present perfect passive, keeping “recently”. Omit the agent.
activities.prompt: The council has recently added two pedestrian crossings.

evaluator.answer: Two pedestrian crossings have recently been added

activities.explanation: El plural usa «have recently been added».

activities.instructions: Rewrite in the passive using “may”. Omit the agent.
activities.prompt: Bad weather may delay the ferry.

evaluator.answer: The ferry may be delayed by bad weather

activities.explanation: La posibilidad pasiva usa «may be delayed»; la causa se conserva con «by».

activities.instructions: Rewrite in the passive using “might”. Omit the agent.
activities.prompt: The organiser might offer a second tour.

evaluator.answer: A second tour might be offered

activities.explanation: La posibilidad se forma con «might be offered».

activities.instructions: Rewrite to express no necessity in the passive. Omit the agent.
activities.prompt: You don't have to print the confirmation email.

evaluator.answer: The confirmation email doesn't have to be printed

activities.explanation: La ausencia de necesidad pasiva usa «doesn't have to be printed».

activities.instructions: Rewrite in the present perfect passive and retain the named agent.
activities.prompt: The accessibility team has revised the entrance plan.

evaluator.answer: The entrance plan has been revised by the accessibility team

activities.explanation: El agente relevante se conserva con «by».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the active question in the present perfect passive. Omit the agent.
activities.prompt: How many trees have volunteers planted this year?

evaluator.answer: How many trees have been planted this year

activities.explanation: La pregunta conserva «How many trees have» y añade «been planted».

activities.instructions: Rewrite the recommendation question in the passive. Omit the agent.
activities.prompt: Should the editor remove this example?

evaluator.answer: Should this example be removed

activities.explanation: La pregunta pasiva usa «Should this example be removed?».

activities.instructions: Rewrite both modal clauses in the passive. Omit the agents.
activities.prompt: Staff must seal the samples, but couriers can transport them at room temperature.

evaluator.answer: The samples must be sealed, but they can be transported at room temperature

activities.explanation: Las dos cláusulas usan «modal + be + participio».

activities.instructions: Rewrite both perfect clauses in the passive. Omit the agents.
activities.prompt: The manufacturer has recalled the units and has contacted affected customers.

evaluator.answer: The units have been recalled and affected customers have been contacted

activities.explanation: Ambos nuevos sujetos plurales usan «have been + participio».

activities.instructions: Rewrite using past simple passive for the dated clause and present perfect passive for the current result. Omit agents.
activities.prompt: The committee cancelled the old permit in 2024, and it has issued a new one now.

evaluator.answer: The old permit was cancelled in 2024, and a new one has been issued now

activities.explanation: La fecha terminada usa «was cancelled» y el resultado actual «has been issued».

activities.instructions: Rewrite both clauses in the passive, preserving “already” and “should”. Omit agents.
activities.prompt: The team has already revised the draft, but reviewers should check the references again.

evaluator.answer: The draft has already been revised, but the references should be checked again

activities.explanation: La primera cláusula usa perfect passive y la segunda modal passive.

activities.instructions: Rewrite the prohibition and no-necessity clauses in the passive. Omit agents.
activities.prompt: Researchers mustn't remove originals, but they don't have to return reference copies.

evaluator.answer: Originals mustn't be removed, but reference copies don't have to be returned

activities.explanation: Se conserva el contraste entre prohibición y ausencia de necesidad.

activities.instructions: Rewrite in the passive, retaining the possible cause with “by”.
activities.prompt: A software conflict may cause the repeated disconnections.

evaluator.answer: The repeated disconnections may be caused by a software conflict

activities.explanation: El modal se conserva y la causa se introduce con «by».

activities.instructions: Rewrite all three active clauses in the passive. Omit agents.
activities.prompt: Staff have checked the alarm, must replace one sensor, and can test the system remotely.

evaluator.answer: The alarm has been checked, one sensor must be replaced, and the system can be tested remotely

activities.explanation: Se combinan present perfect passive y dos pasivas modales.
